content.text:
If you're looking for the **best medspa in Katy, Texas** as of late May 2026, here are several top-rated options—each excelling in its own way. "Best" is subjective and depends on your priorities, whether it’s exceptional ratings, specialized services, physician-led care, or luxury experiences.

---

**1. 4Ever Glow Salon & MedSpa**  
• Holds one of the highest customer ratings in the area: **4.9 stars from 110 reviews** ([medicalspalocator.com](https://www.medicalspalocator.com/med-spa/4ever-glow-salon-medspa-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).  
• Offers a wide range of services typical of a medical spa. If you prioritize reputation and overall guest satisfaction, this is a strong contender.

---

**2. Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics**  
• Known for a **consistent 5-star rating** on Google ([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Offers a unique combination of **IV infusion therapy, aesthetic treatments**, body sculpting, medical weight loss, hormone therapy, and even mobile services ([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Every treatment is performed by **certified nurse practitioners**, and in-house financing available makes this an accessible and well-reviewed choice ([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).

---

**3. Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness**  
• Focuses on **physician-led aesthetic care, medical weight loss, and hormone optimization**, especially tailored for midlife women ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Offers both **in-person and secure virtual consultations** (telemedicine across 23 states) ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Comes with a strong **5-star rating from 132 reviews** ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/?utm_source=openai)).  
If you're looking for medically integrative care, this may be your best match.

---

**4. Soo Med Spa**  
• Positioned as a **premium, personalized med spa** in Katy, with a **5-star rating** ([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Specializes in med‑grade facials, injectables (Botox, Dysport, Xeomin, Daxxify), fillers, skin tightening, chemical peels, microneedling, hair restoration PRP, and more ([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Emphasizes elegant, refined care based on a philosophy of beauty (name “Soo”), appealing if you're seeking luxury and tailored aesthetics ([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

---

**5. Katy Medi Spa**  
• Physician-led with a wide treatment range—**injectables, microneedling, laser hair removal, body contouring, hormone therapy, IV drips**, and functional medicine ([katymedispa.com](https://www.katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• Promotes a mix of **medical and wellness services** under one roof and delivers advanced treatments in an intimate, luxury-like environment ([katymedispa.com](https://www.katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).

---

**6. Other Noteworthy Contenders:**  
• **Ara Med Spa** – Founded in 2024, offers Botox, fillers, laser resurfacing, and body contouring with a focus on affordability and personalization ([thearamedspa.com](https://www.thearamedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• **MedComplete** – Integrates medspa services (lasers, injectables, skin tightening, fat freezing) with **primary care**, offering telehealth and in-clinic options ([medcomplete.org](https://medcomplete.org/?utm_source=openai)).  
• **Macie Aesthetics** – Offers injectables, laser therapy, IV hydration, and skin rejuvenation in a welcoming, evidence-based setting ([macieaesthetics.com](https://macieaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• **HTX Aesthetics** – Led by a board-certified aesthetic nurse specialist with over a decade of experience; specializes in neurotoxins, fillers, and medical-grade skincare ([htx-aesthetics.com](https://htx-aesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• **Selah MediSpa** – Offers a broad mix of aesthetic and wellness treatments—injectables, weight‑loss protocols, body contouring, HydraFacial, microneedling, and more—all aiming at “Luxury Made Affordable” ([selahmedispa.com](https://selahmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)).  
• **GlowMD Aesthetics & Wellness Institute** – Founded by a board-certified physician with over 15 years of experience, offering a blend of aesthetics, wellness, skincare, weight loss, and hormone balance ([drglowtx.com](https://www.drglowtx.com/?utm_source=openai)).

---

### Choosing the Right Medspa for You

To help you decide, here are tailored recommendations based on your priorities:

• If you want **outstanding ratings and a trusted local favorite**:  
  4Ever Glow (4.9 / 110 reviews) or Revitalize (5-star).

• If you're looking for **physician-led or clinically integrated wellness services**:  
  Hibiscus Aesthetics, Katy Medi Spa, or MedComplete.

• If your priority is **luxurious and personalized aesthetic treatments**:  
  Soo Med Spa or GlowMD.

• If you want **affordable, broad-ranging services in a comfortable setting**:  
  Selah MediSpa or Ara Med Spa.

• If you appreciate **skilled injector leadership with a focus on precision**:  
  HTX Aesthetics.

---

### Quick Comparison Table

| Your Priority                          | Recommended Medspa                   |
|----------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| Top ratings & broad services            | Revitalize / 4Ever Glow              |
| Physician‑led wellness & aesthetics     | Hibiscus Aesthetics / MedComplete    |
| Luxury, personalized aesthetics         | Soo Med Spa / GlowMD                 |
| Budget‑friendly, diverse offerings     | Selah MediSpa / Ara Med Spa          |
| Precision injector expertise            | HTX Aesthetics                       |

---

Let me know if you'd like help comparing prices, booking appointments, or narrowing it based on specific treatments (e.g., Botox, weight loss, IV therapy).
